question: Will any more blockade be set up in international waters before June, 2026?
evidence: U.S. Central Command announced the blockade on April 12, 2026, effective April 13, 2026.
The blockade applies to all maritime traffic entering and exiting Iranian ports, enforced impartially against vessels of all nations.
The U.S. Navy began the blockade of the Strait of Hormuz immediately after peace talks with Iran failed.
U.S. forces have boarded and seized vessels attempting to breach the blockade.
The blockade is set to continue until further notice, with no indication of cessation before June 1, 2026.
